name: the whole-tree audit auto-discovers ctp.config.yaml at the audit root and applies it without an explicit flag
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > repo/pod.yaml && printf 'name: my
extends:
  - standard
rules:
  g-k8s-no-privileged-container: off
' > repo/ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && echo audit-auto-discovers 1>&2
